name: LiveAgent

evidence.claim: LiveAgent's API enables seamless software communication, supporting actions like company retrieval and conversation creation.
An API key is an identity of your LiveAgent (like your username and password) which you can use to build your own custom integration solutions.
Search citation: New tools for building agents with the API
Search citation: AI Agents Are Your API's Biggest Consumer. Do They Care About Good Design? - DEV Community

auth_notes: The API uses an API key as the primary identity for integration solutions.
api_notes: LiveAgent provides a REST API with comprehensive documentation for managing conversations, customers, departments, reports, and knowledge base entries.
access_notes: API keys can be generated by admins directly within the LiveAgent configuration panel.
one_liner: LiveAgent is a help desk and live chat software platform that provides an API for automating customer support tasks and integrating with external applications.
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community Model Context Protocol server was found for LiveAgent.
